title: Yacht Charter in Estepona: Guide to Costs and Boats for 2026
html:
Estepona, on the Costa del Sol, offers superb yacht charter from Puerto Deportivo de Estepona, with prices starting around 300 EUR for a half-day on a small motorboat. BoatHire24 connects you directly with local owners and skippers for a memorable day on the Mediterranean.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Estepona?

Half-day motorboat rentals start around 350 EUR, while crewed yachts cost from 1,500 EUR for a full day. Prices vary by boat size, season, and duration. A shared tour can be as low as 80 EUR per person. Check day charters in Estepona on BoatHire24 to compare verified listings and find the best rate for your group. You can day charters in Estepona for your chosen dates.

Where to set off in Estepona

Most charters depart from Puerto Deportivo de Estepona, a modern marina with full facilities. Other popular departure points include Puerto de la Duquesa, 15 km east, and the small harbour at Cabopino. From Estepona, you can cruise to the Bay of Gibraltar or visit Sotogrande, a nearby luxury marina. For a day trip, head to the picturesque town of Marbella, 20 nautical miles up the coast. The nearby islands of Alborán are a longer but rewarding destination. One option worth a look is the Limpopo charter page.

Which boat to rent

  1. Axopar 28 (Limpopo) a sporty day boat for up to 10 guests, ideal for coastal cruising, from 350 EUR. See the Limpopo charter page for photos and availability.
  2. Azimut 40 a stylish flybridge motor yacht for 8 guests, perfect for sunset trips, from 600 EUR.
  3. Sunseeker 50 a spacious luxury yacht for 12 guests, with a skipper and crew, from 1,200 EUR.
  4. Catamaran Lagoon 42 a stable family boat for 10 guests, great for swimming stops, from 900 EUR.
  5. Maiora 26 a superyacht for 20 guests, offering ultimate luxury with a crew of four, from 2,500 EUR.

Costs and price bands

  • Shared tour: from 80 EUR per person, about 3 hours.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): 350, 600 EUR, no licence required for under 15 hp.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): 900, 1,500 EUR, includes drinks and lunch.
  • Crewed yacht full-day (8 hours): 1,200, 3,000 EUR, with professional skipper and host.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Estepona?

No licence is needed for boats under 15 hp, but for larger powered vessels a Spanish recreational licence or equivalent is required. The operator will confirm exact requirements during booking. Most skippered charters include a professional captain, so you can relax without paperwork. You can also see more on the BoatHire24 marketplace.

A local tip: try to sail in May or June when the ‘Poniente’ wind makes the sea calm, avoiding August crowds. Estepona’s coast has many quiet coves only reachable by boat.

When is the best time for yacht charter in Estepona?

High season runs from June to September, with July and August being the busiest and most expensive. The Levante wind can pick up in summer afternoons, so morning trips are often preferred. Spring and autumn offer pleasant weather and lower prices. In 2026, expect similar patterns, with Easter and local festivals also popular.

At a glance

  • Price band: 80, 3,000 EUR per day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 h) to full-day (8 h)
  • Max capacity: from 10 to 20 guests depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Estepona

Can I rent a boat without a skipper in Estepona?

Yes, you can rent smaller motorboats (under 15 hp) without a licence, but many visitors prefer a skippered charter for safety and local knowledge.

How many nautical miles is it from Estepona to Marbella by sea?

The distance is about 20 nautical miles, a comfortable one-hour cruise at typical charter speeds.

What should I bring for a day charter in Estepona?

Bring sunscreen, a hat, swimwear, a towel, and a light jacket for the breeze; the boat usually provides water and soft drinks.

Is it safe to sail off Estepona?

Yes, the coast is well sheltered, and skippers are experienced; always check the weather forecast before heading out.

Whether you are looking for a half-day speedboat or a week-long superyacht, the BoatHire24 marketplace is the easiest way to compare and book. If you own a boat in Estepona, consider becoming a host to earn extra income from your vessel.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Estepona and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
